problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
